onboarding.title: SafeNet
onboarding.step2_title: Which delivery app do you use most?
onboarding.step2_sub: We use this only to personalize your cover
onboarding.step3_sub: Your zone shapes risk, pricing, and payouts

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.pull_to_refresh_hint: Pull down on Home to refresh
dashboard.zone_status_error: Could not load zone status. Pull down to retry.
dashboard.dna_cold_collapsed: Your earning fingerprint will appear after you ride with SafeNet for a little while.
dashboard.dna_cold_body: Peaks, hourly rates, and weekly totals will show here once we see real completed trips and payouts — not demo placeholders.
dashboard.protection_cold_hint: Protected amounts appear after verified disruptions and payouts in your zone.
dashboard.claim_pipeline_banner: Claim processing is active — open Claims for live status.
dashboard.active_disruption: Active disruption — check Claims for details.

claims.title: Claims
claims.screen_sub: Live lifecycle and your full claim history
claims.zone_monitoring: No verified disruption in your zone. Weather, AQI, and official alerts stay monitored.
claims.payout_basis: Payout reflects your policy terms, verified disruption, and earning fingerprint for this time window.
claims.fingerprint_hint: Aligned with your usual earning level for this day and time.
claims.history_empty_hint: Past claims will appear after verified disruptions.

policy.title: Coverage
policy.forecast_shield_coverage_fallback: Coverage may auto-adjust when high-confidence weather risk is predicted.
policy.outlook_disclaimer_end: (India time, Asia/Kolkata). Pulled from the live weather API for your zone centre — open Coverage and pull to refresh for the latest.
policy.ai_risk_sub: Updates from your profile, zone, trust, and recent activity (0–100).
policy.ai_risk_calibrating: Calibrating from your first rides and payouts — score stays at 0 until there is enough history (0–100 scale).

assistant.voice_hint: Speak in your selected app language

errors.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.server_error: Server error. Please try again later.
